name: Herbed Stuffing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Using firm textured bread, cut slices into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F. (150 degrees C).
3. Put bread cubes in two 13 x 9-inch baking pans.
4. Toast bread cubes in oven for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from oven and cool slightly.
6. Stir in oil, onion, parsley flakes, garlic salt, sage, and seasoned pepper.
7. Lightly toss bread cubes with seasonings to coat them evenly.
8. Transfer mixture to a large airtight container and label Herbed Stuffing Mix.
9. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 3 to 4 months.
Makes about 12 cups of mix.
